name: The Highlands Bourbon Balls
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb semi-sweet chocolate, chopped into squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine pecans and bourbon in a bowl; allow to sit for at least 3 hours so the pecans can absorb the bourbon flavor.
2. Cream butter and powdered sugar using a mixer. Add the bourbon and pecan mixture.
3. Roll the mixture into small balls and refrigerate for 1-1/2 hours.
4. Melt chocolate in a double boiler, adding shaved paraffin until fully melted.
5. Dip the balls into the chocolate and place on waxed paper to set (use a fork or long skewer when dipping).
